revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23368769069|time triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_South_Africa%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_South_Africa%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Documentation subpage}}
<kbd>Country_data</kbd> templates are also available for each of the nine [[Provinces of South Africa|provinces of South Africa]]:
{| style="background-color:#ecfcf4"
|-
| [[Template:Country data Free State]] || {{flag|Free State}}
|-
|[[Template:Country data Eastern Cape]]|| {{flag|Eastern Cape}}
|-
|[[Template:Country data Gauteng]]|| {{flag|Gauteng}}
|-
|[[Template:Country data KwaZulu-Natal]] || {{flag|KwaZulu-Natal}}
|-
|[[Template:Country data Limpopo]]|| {{flag|Limpopo}}
|-
|[[Template:Country data Mpumalanga Province]] || {{flag|Mpumalanga}}
|-
|[[Template:Country data North West (South African province)]]|| {{flag|North West}}
|-
|[[Template:Country data Northern Cape]]|| {{flag|Northern Cape}}
|-
|[[Template:Country data Western Cape]] || {{flag|Western Cape}}
|}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||
<!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata -->
}}</includeonly>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Country data templates of countries|South Africa]]
[[Category:Country data templates of South Africa| ]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24919637890|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:

Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Documentation subpage}}
<kbd>Country_data</kbd> templates are also available for each of the nine [[Provinces of South Africa|provinces of South Africa]]:
{| style="background-color:#ecfcf4"
|-
| [[Template:Country data Free State]] || {{flag|Free State}}
|-
|[[Template:Country data Eastern Cape]]|| {{flag|Eastern Cape}}
|-
|[[Template:Country data Gauteng]]|| {{flag|Gauteng}}
|-
|[[Template:Country data KwaZulu-Natal]] || {{flag|KwaZulu-Natal}}
|-
|[[Template:Country data Limpopo]]|| {{flag|Limpopo}}
|-
|[[Template:Country data Mpumalanga Province]] || {{flag|Mpumalanga}}
|-
|[[Template:Country data North West (South African province)]]|| {{flag|North West}}
|-
|[[Template:Country data Northern Cape]]|| {{flag|Northern Cape}}
|-
|[[Template:Country data Western Cape]] || {{flag|Western Cape}}
|}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||

}}</includeonly>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Country data templates of countries|South Africa]]
[[Category:Country data templates of South Africa| ]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
